title: 8th Birthday 12" Multicoloured Numbers Printed Latex Age Balloons, Digit 8 for Girls Boys 8 Year Old Decorations, 8th Anniversary Party (Pack of 10)
features: Latex Balloons measure approximately 12" (30.4cm) when inflated (ship uninflated) and are designed to be filled with helium.
Ideal for birthday, parties, celebration, and other activities
Balloons can be expanded to approximately 12 inches when fully inflated
description: Product description 10pcs 12” multicoloured number printed latex balloons Safety Warning 3+
